description: Organize room dimensions and calculate paint quantities and costs for a home renovation project. Calculate wall area, paint quantity using the ROUNDUP function, and total cost including tax. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/renovation_calculations.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You are helping a homeowner calculate paint needs for their renovation. The room dimensions are partially complete - organize the data, calculate wall areas (accounting for doors and windows), determine paint quantities needed (rounded up to whole gallons), and calculate total costs including tax.
